title: GP-Next Worldmap JSON / GP-Next 世界地图 JSON
description: Schema for gp-next runtime world-map replacement patches. 用于 GP-Next 运行时世界地图替代补丁。

apiVersion.description: Worldmap JSON API version. Current format is version 1. worldmap JSON 的 API 版本；当前格式为第 1 版。

worlds.description: Map keyed by world CODENAME. 以世界 CODENAME 为键的对象。

worldData.description: World-level data overrides. 世界级数据覆盖。

mode.description: Replace the runtime graph completely. 完全替代运行时地图图结构。

reuseOriginalPositions.description: When a mainline node omits `position`, reuse the original world mainline position at the same mainline array index. 当主线节点未写 `position` 时，复用原地图主线中相同主线数组下标的位置。

overlapThreshold.description: Warn if nodes are closer than this distance. 节点距离小于该值时给出重叠警告。

mainline.description: Ordered mainline node list. Array order defines the main progression automatically. 有序主线节点列表；数组顺序自动定义主线推进。

branches.description: Optional side-branch node list. Branch nodes are connected through `children` refs. 可选支线节点列表；支线通过 `children` 引用连接。

autoLayout.description: Fallback layout settings. 自动布局回退参数。

baseX.description: Fallback base X. 自动布局基准 X。

baseY.description: Fallback base Y. 自动布局基准 Y。

xStep.description: Horizontal spacing, default 330. 水平间距，默认 330。

yStep.description: Vertical spacing, default 180. 垂直间距，默认 180。

id.description: Stable node id used by children refs. 供 children 引用的稳定节点 id。

type.description: Runtime island type. 运行时节点类型。

appearance.description: Level-node appearance for type=level. Use gargantuar for 'small boss' / giant-island style stages. level 类型节点的外观类别；“小 Boss”/巨人岛风格关卡用 gargantuar。

title.description: Visible node title / label. 节点上显示的标题文字。

template.description: Template selector used only while cloning visuals/components from the loaded runtime map. For `giftBox` / `epicPortal`, `type` selectors are restricted to real vanilla special-node candidates instead of generic same-type fallback. 仅在从当前已加载运行时地图克隆视觉/组件时使用的模板选择器。对于 `giftBox` / `epicPortal`，按 `type` 选择时会限制为真正的原版特殊节点候选，而不是泛化同类回退。

levels.description: Level ids for level nodes. level 节点对应的关卡 id 列表。

portalLevels.description: Epic level ids for epicPortal nodes. epicPortal 节点对应的史诗关卡 id 列表。

plantReward.description: Plant reward for plant nodes. plant 节点的植物奖励。

upgradeReward.description: Upgrade reward for upgrade nodes. upgrade 节点的升级奖励。

children.description: Additional child node ids. For `mainline`, GP-Next auto-links the next mainline item before these declared children. 额外子节点 id 列表；对于 `mainline`，GP-Next 会先自动连接下一项主线，再追加这里声明的子节点。

warnOverlap.description: Enable overlap warning for this node. 是否为该节点启用重叠警告。

overlapThreshold.description: Per-node overlap warning distance. 当前节点自己的重叠警告距离。

endlessSpec.description: Separate endless-island declaration. Currently accepted for compatibility but ignored at runtime; vanilla endless islands stay unchanged because endless islands use different runtime semantics from gift/portal special nodes. 独立的无尽岛声明；当前仅为兼容而保留，运行时会忽略并保留原版无尽岛，因为无尽岛的运行时语义与礼盒/传送门特殊节点不同。

oneOf.description: Compatibility-only field; runtime currently ignores custom endless replacement. 兼容字段；运行时当前会忽略自定义无尽替换。

keepOriginal.description: Compatibility hint. Vanilla endless islands are currently always kept untouched. 兼容提示；当前原版无尽岛始终保持不变。

nodes.description: Compatibility-only field; runtime currently ignores custom endless replacement. 兼容字段；运行时当前会忽略自定义无尽替换。

type.description: Endless islands are level nodes. 无尽岛本质上是 level 节点。

templateSelector.description: Selector used only when cloning from existing runtime nodes. `levelId` can match either ordinary levelJsonsID or endless-island entrance levelsID. 仅在从现有运行时节点克隆时使用的模板选择器；其中 `levelId` 既可匹配普通 levelJsonsID，也可匹配无尽岛入口的 levelsID。

id.description: Match by stable runtime/custom id. 按稳定运行时/custom id 匹配。

customId.description: Match by GP-Next custom id. 按 GP-Next 自定义 id 匹配。

levelId.description: Match a level island by ordinary levelJsonsID or endless entrance levelsID. 按普通 levelJsonsID 或无尽入口 levelsID 匹配 level 岛。

levelIds.description: Match a level island by all listed ordinary/endless level ids. 按给出的普通/无尽关卡 id 集合匹配 level 岛。

portalLevelId.description: Match an epic portal by one represented epic level id. 按单个史诗关卡 id 匹配传送门。

portalLevelIds.description: Match an epic portal by all represented epic level ids. 按整组史诗关卡 id 匹配传送门。

type.description: Match by runtime island type. For `giftBox` / `epicPortal`, GP-Next only accepts real vanilla special-node candidates that already carry the corresponding runtime visual/component chain. 按运行时节点类型匹配。对于 `giftBox` / `epicPortal`，GP-Next 只接受已经携带对应运行时视觉/组件链的真正原版特殊节点候选。

appearance.description: Match by level-node appearance family. 按 level 节点外观族匹配。

plantDisplayed.description: Match a plant node by displayed reward. 按展示的植物奖励匹配植物节点。

upgradeDisplayed.description: Match an upgrade node by displayed reward. 按展示的升级奖励匹配升级节点。

x.description: Local X position. 本地 X 坐标。

y.description: Local Y position. 本地 Y 坐标。

z.description: Local Z position. 本地 Z 坐标。

positionOffset.description: Offset relative to the resolved parent node position. 相对于父节点解析后位置的偏移量。

x.description: Relative X offset. 相对 X 偏移。

y.description: Relative Y offset. 相对 Y 偏移。

z.description: Relative Z offset. 相对 Z 偏移。
